revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: <noinclude>Please avoid using this stub note. Instead, please [[Wikipedia:Stub sorting|sort]] this as either a {{tl|novel-stub}} or a {{tl|nonfiction-book-stub}}. </noinclude>{{asbox | image = Books-aj.svg aj ashton 01.svg | subject = | qualifier = about a book | category = Book stubs | name = Template:Book-stub }}<noinclude> [[Category:Book stub templates| ]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Book-stub here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
